narrative:
Valley Township has 1,251 registered voters, with 58.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
